isi.lyrics:
Lyric Manny & Jhunnit - How to Love

Romanization

Time was flowed
My head to toes
Not ready to forget
Only your scent oh oh around me
You would know know I'm starving
Of your touch yeah saved my life
Memories with you cry inside
Moments shared we buried in time
The smile your laugh
Promise that we swear to God
Conversations countless night we got
All the things
Still in deep deep deep deep inside me
You whipped whipped whipped whipped me hardly
I just wanna ski-ee-ip skip the scene we
Broke up finally
Where you at girl, who taught me how to
Love love love love love
Without you not a love love love love love
How to love love love love
See me how I'm dying

It's none of your business

You don't have to take care
Keep movin' like that far far away from me
Run away from me
We'll never meet cause we're running on the

But it sounds so bad

When I meet you accidentally accidentally

The time we're kissin' can't rewind but
Still in deep deep deep deep inside me

I just wanna ski-ee-ip skip the scene we
Broke up finally
Where you at girl who taught me how to

I'm dying

How to love
